entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop (Cicer arietinum L.) grown in semi-arid tropics to mitigate protein malnutrition

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A pulse crop (Cajanus cajan L.) grown in semi-arid tropics to mitigate protein malnutrition

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions where chickpea and pigeonpea are primarily cultivated

entities.name: PROTEIN MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition of lacking sufficient protein, which pulse crops help mitigate

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that act as major yield constraints for crops

entities.name: WATER-LOGGING
entities.description: A state of excess soil moisture causing stress to crops

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A state of limited soil moisture causing stress to crops

entities.name: HEAT
entities.description: High temperature stress affecting crop growth

entities.name: CHILLING
entities.description: Low temperature stress affecting crop growth

entities.name: SOIL SALINITY
entities.description: High salt concentration in soil acting as a stress factor

entities.name: ACIDITY
entities.description: Low soil pH acting as a stress factor

entities.name: YIELD CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Factors that limit the productivity of crops

entities.name: RAINFED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Agricultural conditions where crops are grown without irrigation

entities.name: MARGINAL AND DEGRADED LANDS
entities.description: Risk-prone lands with few or no inputs where pulse crops are grown

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain growth and yield under abiotic stress

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring physical traits to improve selection efficiency

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining genetic makeup to improve selection efficiency

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: Modern tools used for high-throughput genotyping and phenotyping

entities.name: GENETICS
entities.description: The study of heredity used in an integrated approach for crop improvement

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of biological functions used in an integrated approach for crop improvement

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGY
entities.description: The use of biological systems and organisms to improve crop traits

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to develop crop varieties with improved traits
